claim_boundary: Automated EVT engineering validation plan and CAD-derived checks; not physical validation.

tolerance_cases.note: Minimum board edge clearance to outer molded envelope.
Minimum modeled shell clearance to external USB-C aperture.
Minimum gap from pouch battery to rigid PCB islands.
Nominal side-key force divided by cap contact area.

domain_reviews.next_validation: Run thermal simulation after routed board power map and enclosure resin are locked.

domain_reviews.target: requires antenna simulation and chamber pre-scan
domain_reviews.next_validation: Export antenna keepouts into PCB/RF tool and run desense/SAR pre-scan.
Measure loudspeaker, mic, and earpiece leakage with molded sample and gasket stack.
Run FEA/drop pre-check, then corner/face/edge drop on soft-tool samples.
Add real port membranes/gaskets and run dust/splash tests after supplier stack lock.

assembly_sequence: Mold orange back shell and side frame; inspect gate, ejector, sink, and color consistency.
Install USB-C receptacle, bottom speaker, microphones, earpiece gasket, haptic, and cameras onto PCB/subassemblies.
Place battery into ribbed window and connect board/display FPC using the KiCad mechanical handoff constraints.
Bond screen cover glass/display stack with die-cut adhesive and verify FPC bend radius.
Install orange power and volume caps, close snap hooks/screws, then inspect button force, USB insertion, audio ports, and camera windows.

dvt_plan.criterion: 20k-cycle candidate port; no shell shift or aperture rub.
1.2-2.2 N actuation and no cap sticking after tolerance extremes.
No lift, no glass clash, bend radius >= 1.0 mm.
Antenna keepouts respected with cellular and Wi-Fi active.
Speaker, earpiece, and mic paths pass OEM acoustic targets.
Toolmaker signs off draft, gates, ejectors, cooling, sink, and parting line.
